---
name: "Topic or Guest Post"
about: Suggest a topic for Pierre to cover or propose a guest post
title: "[Topic]: "
labels: content
assignees: ""
---

**Type**

- [ ] Topic suggestion
- [ ] Guest post proposal
- [ ] Follow-up or correction to an existing post

**Working title or topic**
A concise title or topic description.

**Why this matters**
Explain why this topic deserves attention and who would benefit from it.

**Suggested angle**
Describe the specific question, argument, tutorial, case study, or comparison
the post should focus on.

**Outline**
For guest posts, include a short outline. For topic suggestions, include the
main points or questions you think should be covered.

**Sources and references**
Add links to papers, docs, articles, repositories, datasets, examples, or other
materials that would help evaluate the topic.

**Author attribution**
For guest posts, note how you would like to be credited if the post is accepted.

**Conflicts of interest**
Disclose any relevant employment, sponsorship, affiliation, product ownership,
or vendor relationship.

**Additional context**
Add anything else that would help evaluate the suggestion.
